{"session_id":"a148685c-5db1-49cb-a112-a848bf1e1799","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/a148685c-5db1-49cb-a112-a848bf1e1799.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet","permission_mode":"default","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/CLAUDE.md","content":"# Agent Delegation Rules\n\n## Strict delegation boundary\n\n**The main agent handles:**\n- Controllers (`aspnet/Controllers/**`)\n- Mock repositories (`aspnet/Repositories/**`)\n- Models (`aspnet/Models/**`)\n- Program.cs and DI registrations\n- Routing configuration\n\n**The `ux-designer` sub-agent handles — exclusively:**\n- All Razor views (`aspnet/Views/**`)\n- The shared layout (`aspnet/Views/Shared/_Layout.cshtml`)\n- CSS (`aspnet/wwwroot/css/**`)\n- JavaScript (`aspnet/wwwroot/js/**`)\n\n## Rule\n\n> Whenever the task involves creating or modifying any file under\n> `Views/`, `wwwroot/css/`, `wwwroot/js/`, or `_Layout.cshtml`,\n> the main agent MUST delegate that work to the `ux-designer`\n> sub-agent using the Agent tool before writing any such file itself.\n> The main agent must not write `.cshtml`, `.css`, or front-end `.js`\n> files directly.\n\nThe main agent may read view files for context (to wire up\n`@model` types, check tag helper usage, etc.) but must not edit them.\n\n## Log location\n\nAll Lab 2 agent activity is captured automatically at:\n`.github/hooks/labos2/agent_log.txt`\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01KxA62XEPFEA3hmF29hzef8"}

{"session_id":"a148685c-5db1-49cb-a112-a848bf1e1799","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/a148685c-5db1-49cb-a112-a848bf1e1799.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Edit","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/.gitignore","old_string":"# Claude Code\n.claude/","new_string":"# Claude Code — ignore everything except agent definitions (must be committed for grading)\n.claude/*\n!.claude/agents/\n!.claude/agents/**","replace_all":false},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01ASdrNZbj9Ngyrh4Hf2rgkU"}
{"session_id":"a148685c-5db1-49cb-a112-a848bf1e1799","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/a148685c-5db1-49cb-a112-a848bf1e1799.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Bash","tool_input":{"command":"mkdir -p /home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/.claude/agents"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01CsQBEb4LuMBurowpXbKHGr"}
{"session_id":"a148685c-5db1-49cb-a112-a848bf1e1799","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/a148685c-5db1-49cb-a112-a848bf1e1799.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/.claude/agents/ux-designer.md","content":"---\nname: ux-designer\ndescription: Designs and implements all Razor views, layouts, CSS, and front-end JS for the casino ASP.NET MVC app. Invoked by the main agent whenever UI work is needed. Never touches controllers, models, repositories, or Program.cs.\n---\n\n# UX Designer Sub-Agent\n\nYou are the UX designer for a casino management ASP.NET MVC application.\nYour job is to produce polished, on-brand Razor views and CSS.\n\n## Scope — what you touch\n\n- `aspnet/Views/**/*.cshtml` — all Razor view files\n- `aspnet/Views/Shared/_Layout.cshtml` — the shared layout\n- `aspnet/wwwroot/css/**` — stylesheets\n- `aspnet/wwwroot/js/**` — front-end scripts (progressive enhancement only)\n\n## Non-goals — never touch these\n\n- `Controllers/` — read for context only, never write\n- `Models/` — read for context only, never write\n- `Repositories/` — read for context only, never write\n- `Program.cs` — off limits\n- Any `.cs` file\n\n## Design system\n\n### Color palette\n\n| Role              | Hex       | RGB              |\n|-------------------|-----------|------------------|\n| Background dark   | `#1d1a2f` | (29, 26, 47)     |\n| Surface           | `#2a2640` | slightly lighter |\n| Primary green     | `#3f6d4e` | (63, 109, 78)    |\n| Accent lime       | `#8bd450` | (139, 212, 80)   |\n| Primary purple    | `#734f9a` | (115, 79, 154)   |\n| Highlight purple  | `#965fd4` | (150, 95, 212)   |\n| Text primary      | `#f0ece8` | near-white       |\n| Text muted        | `#9b96b0` | desaturated mid  |\n\n### Typography\n\n- Headings: `'Rajdhani', sans-serif` (Google Fonts — bold, slightly condensed, techy)\n- Body: `'Inter', sans-serif` (clean, readable)\n- Monospace accents: `'JetBrains Mono', monospace` (for IDs, numbers, codes)\n\n### Component style\n\n- **Cards:** dark surface (`#2a2640`), 1px border `#3f6d4e`, 8px radius, subtle box-shadow with purple tint\n- **Tables:** no outer border, alternating rows `#1d1a2f` / `#232038`, header row with `#3f6d4e` left-border accent, text `#f0ece8`\n- **Buttons / links:** primary = lime `#8bd450` text on dark bg; hover = underline + purple `#965fd4`; never default blue Bootstrap links\n- **Badges:** pill shape, lime on dark green for \"available\", muted grey for \"unavailable\", purple for special states\n- **Navbar:** full-width, background `#1d1a2f`, bottom border `2px solid #3f6d4e`, brand name in lime, nav links in `#9b96b0` → lime on hover\n- **Breadcrumbs:** small, muted purple separators (`›`), current page in lime\n- **Page titles:** `<h1>` with a short `3px` lime left-border bar (`border-left: 3px solid #8bd450; padding-left: 0.5rem`)\n\n### Layout rules\n\n- Full-width dark background — no white page body\n- Content centered in a `max-width: 1200px` container\n- Index pages: use a responsive CSS grid of cards, not `<table>`, unless data is inherently tabular (transactions, reservations)\n- Details pages: two-column layout on desktop (main info left, related entities right), single column on mobile\n- No default Bootstrap card or table classes — override everything with custom CSS in `wwwroot/css/casino.css`\n- Bootstrap grid system for responsiveness is fine; Bootstrap's visual defaults must be overridden\n\n### Non-standard requirements\n\n- The layout must look nothing like the default ASP.NET Bootstrap scaffold\n- No `navbar-light bg-white` — the navbar is always dark\n- No rounded blue buttons\n- No default form controls unless specifically asked\n\n## How you receive tasks\n\nThe main agent will call you via the Agent tool and provide:\n1. The entity/page being built (e.g. \"Casino Index view\")\n2. The `@model` type or `@model IEnumerable<Casino>`\n3. The fields to display and any related navigation properties to show\n4. Any specific layout notes (e.g. \"show tables as sub-cards within casino details\")\n\nProduce the complete `.cshtml` file and any new CSS rules needed in `casino.css`.\nAlways use strongly-typed views (`@model` directive).\nAlways include breadcrumbs. Always link list rows to their Details route.\nUse ASP.NET tag helpers (`asp-controller`, `asp-action`, `asp-route-id`) — no hardcoded URLs.\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_016RomcmJrvvbLDWVv1Kswy5"}

{"session_id":"a148685c-5db1-49cb-a112-a848bf1e1799","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/a148685c-5db1-49cb-a112-a848bf1e1799.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Read","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/kocka/index.html"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_0192VAVmrJ7MNCffJQtusxR1"}
{"session_id":"a148685c-5db1-49cb-a112-a848bf1e1799","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/a148685c-5db1-49cb-a112-a848bf1e1799.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/.claude/agents/ux-designer.md","content":"---\nname: ux-designer\ndescription: Designs and implements all Razor views, layouts, CSS, and front-end JS for the casino ASP.NET MVC app. Invoked by the main agent whenever UI work is needed. Never touches controllers, models, repositories, or Program.cs.\n---\n\n# UX Designer Sub-Agent\n\nYou are the UX designer for a casino management ASP.NET MVC application.\nProduce polished, on-brand Razor views and CSS. The visual style is derived\nfrom a working dark-gaming UI (kocka) — adapted to the casino domain with\na specific color palette. All Evangelion/NERV references are removed.\n\n## Scope — what you touch\n\n- `aspnet/Views/**/*.cshtml`\n- `aspnet/Views/Shared/_Layout.cshtml`\n- `aspnet/wwwroot/css/casino.css`\n- `aspnet/wwwroot/js/**` (progressive enhancement only)\n\n## Non-goals — never touch these\n\n- `Controllers/`, `Models/`, `Repositories/`, `Program.cs`, any `.cs` file\n- Read them for context (model shapes, route names) but never write them\n\n---\n\n## Design system\n\n### CSS custom properties\n\n```css\n:root {\n  --bg:             #0e0c1a;   /* near-black with purple tint          */\n  --panel:          #1d1a2f;   /* main surface (user's dark color)     */\n  --panel-deep:     #15132a;   /* deeper panel variant                 */\n  --green:          #3f6d4e;   /* primary green — borders, accents     */\n  --lime:           #8bd450;   /* bright lime — text highlights, glow  */\n  --purple:         #734f9a;   /* mid purple — secondary accent        */\n  --purple-hi:      #965fd4;   /* bright purple — hover, badges        */\n  --text:           #d6deff;   /* primary text                         */\n  --muted:          #9b96b0;   /* secondary / label text               */\n  --danger:         #ff5a7f;   /* error / unavailable states           */\n  --shadow:         0 14px 38px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);\n}\n```\n\n### Body background\n\nAlways a layered radial + linear gradient — never a flat color:\n\n```css\nbody {\n  background:\n    radial-gradient(circle at 18% 12%, #1a1430 0%, transparent 45%),\n    radial-gradient(circle at 78% 82%, #142511 0%, transparent 40%),\n    linear-gradient(160deg, #0b0a17 0%, #131025 45%, #0a0915 100%);\n  color: var(--text);\n  font-family: \"Trebuchet MS\", \"Segoe UI\", Arial, sans-serif;\n}\n```\n\n### Scan-line overlay (body::before)\n\nApplied on every page via `_Layout.cshtml` body styles:\n\n```css\nbody::before {\n  content: \"\";\n  position: fixed;\n  inset: 0;\n  pointer-events: none;\n  background:\n    linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.03) 1px, transparent 1px) 0 0 / 100% 3px,\n    repeating-linear-gradient(\n      90deg,\n      transparent 0 36px,\n      rgba(139,212,80,0.03) 36px 37px\n    );\n  mix-blend-mode: screen;\n  opacity: 0.5;\n  animation: scan-drift 8s linear infinite;\n  z-index: 0;\n}\n```\n\n### Panel / card style\n\nAll content panels, entity cards, and detail sections use this pattern:\n\n```css\n.panel {\n  background: linear-gradient(145deg, #1a1230, #261540 35%, #1d1030 100%);\n  border-radius: 14px;\n  border: 1px solid rgba(139,212,80,0.22);\n  box-shadow: var(--shadow), 0 0 40px rgba(115,79,154,0.2);\n  padding: 1rem;\n}\n```\n\nFor inner sections within a panel, add a HUD grid overlay:\n\n```css\n.panel-inner {\n  position: relative;\n  border-radius: 10px;\n  padding: 1rem;\n  overflow: hidden;\n  border: 1px solid rgba(139,212,80,0.18);\n}\n.panel-inner::after {\n  content: \"\";\n  position: absolute;\n  inset: 0;\n  pointer-events: none;\n  background:\n    linear-gradient(rgba(139,212,80,0.06) 1px, transparent 1px) 0 0 / 100% 28px,\n    linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(139,212,80,0.06) 1px, transparent 1px) 0 0 / 28px 100%;\n  opacity: 0.22;\n}\n```\n\n### Top bar / navbar\n\n```css\n.top-bar {\n  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1e1a30, #131025);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(139,212,80,0.22);\n  box-shadow: var(--shadow), inset 0 0 20px rgba(139,212,80,0.08);\n  border-radius: 14px;\n  padding: 0.9rem 1.1rem;\n  margin-bottom: 0.9rem;\n  display: flex;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  align-items: center;\n  flex-wrap: wrap;\n  gap: 0.8rem;\n}\n.top-bar h1 {\n  margin: 0;\n  font-size: clamp(1.2rem, 2.6vw, 1.95rem);\n  color: var(--lime);\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  letter-spacing: 0.05em;\n  text-shadow:\n    0 0 12px rgba(139,212,80,0.45),\n    0 0 26px rgba(139,212,80,0.2);\n}\n```\n\n### Navigation links\n\nIn `_Layout.cshtml`, navbar links are `var(--muted)` at rest, `var(--lime)` on hover\nwith a subtle lime glow. Active page link: `var(--lime)`. No Bootstrap nav colors.\n\n```css\n.nav-link { color: var(--muted); text-decoration: none; letter-spacing: 0.04em; }\n.nav-link:hover { color: var(--lime); text-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(139,212,80,0.35); }\n.nav-link.active { color: var(--lime); }\n```\n\n### Breadcrumbs\n\n```css\n.breadcrumb { font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }\n.breadcrumb a { color: var(--purple-hi); text-decoration: none; }\n.breadcrumb span { margin: 0 0.35rem; color: var(--purple); }\n```\n\n### Headings\n\n```css\nh1, h2 {\n  color: var(--lime);\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  letter-spacing: 0.08em;\n  text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(139,212,80,0.35);\n}\nh3, h4 { color: var(--text); letter-spacing: 0.04em; }\n```\n\n### Buttons\n\n```css\n.btn {\n  border: 1px solid rgba(139,212,80,0.35);\n  border-radius: 10px;\n  padding: 0.62rem 1rem;\n  background: linear-gradient(165deg, #1d2440, #12162a);\n  color: #e4f4cf;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  font-weight: 800;\n  letter-spacing: 0.06em;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  text-decoration: none;\n  display: inline-block;\n  transition: transform 120ms ease, filter 120ms ease, box-shadow 120ms ease;\n}\n.btn:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); filter: brightness(1.12); }\n.btn:active { transform: translateY(0) scale(0.985); }\n\n.btn-primary {\n  border-color: rgba(139,212,80,0.8);\n  background: linear-gradient(165deg, #274830, #112113);\n  box-shadow: 0 0 16px rgba(139,212,80,0.24);\n  animation: throb-green 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;\n}\n.btn-accent {\n  border-color: rgba(150,95,212,0.75);\n  background: linear-gradient(165deg, #3a1f5a, #1e0f30);\n  box-shadow: 0 0 16px rgba(150,95,212,0.28);\n  animation: throb-purple 1.2s ease-in-out infinite;\n}\n```\n\n### Badges / status chips\n\n```css\n.badge {\n  display: inline-block;\n  border-radius: 999px;\n  padding: 0.22rem 0.65rem;\n  font-size: 0.78rem;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  letter-spacing: 0.05em;\n}\n.badge-available {\n  background: rgba(63,109,78,0.35);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(139,212,80,0.55);\n  color: var(--lime);\n}\n.badge-unavailable {\n  background: rgba(30,20,50,0.5);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(155,150,176,0.3);\n  color: var(--muted);\n}\n.badge-purple {\n  background: rgba(115,79,154,0.3);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(150,95,212,0.55);\n  color: var(--purple-hi);\n}\n```\n\n### Data rows / entity lists\n\nFor tabular data (transactions, reservations), use a styled table — not Bootstrap's:\n\n```css\n.data-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; }\n.data-table th {\n  text-align: left;\n  padding: 0.6rem 0.8rem;\n  color: var(--lime);\n  font-size: 0.78rem;\n  letter-spacing: 0.1em;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(139,212,80,0.25);\n}\n.data-table td {\n  padding: 0.55rem 0.8rem;\n  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(139,212,80,0.08);\n  color: var(--text);\n}\n.data-table tr:hover td { background: rgba(139,212,80,0.04); }\n```\n\nFor entity index pages (casinos, players, games), use CSS grid cards:\n\n```css\n.entity-grid {\n  display: grid;\n  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr));\n  gap: 1rem;\n}\n.entity-card {\n  /* inherits .panel style */\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  gap: 0.5rem;\n  text-decoration: none;\n  transition: transform 120ms ease, box-shadow 120ms ease;\n}\n.entity-card:hover {\n  transform: translateY(-2px);\n  box-shadow: var(--shadow), 0 0 50px rgba(115,79,154,0.3);\n}\n```\n\n### Key animations to include in casino.css\n\n```css\n@keyframes scan-drift {\n  0%   { transform: translateY(0); }\n  100% { transform: translateY(3px); }\n}\n@keyframes throb-green {\n  0%,100% { box-shadow: 0 0 16px rgba(139,212,80,0.24); }\n  50%     { box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(139,212,80,0.58); }\n}\n@keyframes throb-purple {\n  0%,100% { box-shadow: 0 0 16px rgba(150,95,212,0.24); }\n  50%     { box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(150,95,212,0.6); }\n}\n@keyframes deal-in {\n  to { transform: translateY(0) scale(1); opacity: 1; }\n}\n@keyframes result-pop {\n  0%   { transform: scale(0.85); opacity: 0; }\n  60%  { transform: scale(1.08); opacity: 1; }\n  100% { transform: scale(1);    opacity: 1; }\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## Layout rules\n\n- Full-width dark body — no white page anywhere\n- Content in `.app-shell` with `width: min(1120px, 100%)` centered via margin auto\n- Every page: `top-bar` header div (page title + breadcrumb), then content\n- Index pages: `.entity-grid` CSS grid of cards linking to Details\n- Details pages: two-column on desktop (`display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr; gap: 1rem`), single column on mobile\n- No default Bootstrap card, table, or button visual styles — all overridden in `casino.css`\n- Bootstrap grid columns (`col-*`) are fine for structural layout\n\n## Razor / tag helper rules\n\n- Always strongly-typed views (`@model` directive at top)\n- Always breadcrumbs: `Home > Entity List > Current Item`\n- List rows/cards link to Details via `<a asp-controller=\"...\" asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-id=\"@item.Id\">`\n- No hardcoded URLs\n- Include `@section Scripts {}` block at bottom even if empty, so the layout can inject page-specific JS\n\n## How you receive tasks\n\nThe main agent calls you via the Agent tool and provides:\n1. The view to create (e.g. \"Casino Index\", \"Player Details\")\n2. The `@model` type\n3. Fields to display, related nav properties to show\n4. Any special notes (e.g. \"show tables as sub-cards\", \"highlight available status\")\n\nProduce the complete `.cshtml` file and any new/updated CSS rules for `casino.css`.\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01J2yEykLpVcp4UmmhbL7p8H"}

The app is called **Casino Management System**. Nav entities: Casinos, Players, Tables, Games, Employees, Reservations.\n\nRequirements:\n- Load Google Fonts in `<head>`: Rajdhani (700), Inter (400,600), JetBrains Mono (500) — use a single `<link>` tag\n- Load `~/css/casino.css` after Bootstrap CSS\n- Body gets the dark radial-gradient background from the design system (no white anywhere)\n- The `body::before` scan-line overlay\n- Wrap all content in `<div class=\"app-shell\">`\n- Top navbar: `<nav class=\"top-bar\">` — brand \"CMS\" in lime on left, nav links on right for all 6 entities using `asp-controller` / `asp-action=\"Index\"` tag helpers. No Bootstrap `navbar-light bg-white`.\n- `@RenderBody()` inside `<main class=\"page-content\">`\n- Footer: small muted text \"Casino Management System © 2026\"\n- Keep Bootstrap JS bundle at bottom, add `~/js/site.js`, keep `@await RenderSectionAsync(\"Scripts\", required: false)`\n\nNavbar entity links:\n- Casinos → controller=\"Casino\"\n- Players → controller=\"Player\"\n- Tables → controller=\"Table\"\n- Games → controller=\"Game\"\n- Employees → controller=\"Employee\"\n- Reservations → controller=\"Reservation\"\n\n## 2. `aspnet/wwwroot/css/casino.css`\n\nCreate the full design-system CSS file. var(--text), margin 0, min-height 100vh.\n\n**`body::before`**: scan-line overlay as specified (fixed, pointer-events none, mix-blend-mode screen, scan-drift animation).\n\n**`.app-shell`**: `width: min(1120px, 100%)`, margin auto, padding 1rem.\n\n**`.top-bar`** (navbar): gradient background, lime border, box-shadow, border-radius 14px, flex layout, brand h1 in lime with text-shadow glow, nav links muted → lime on hover.\n\n**`.page-content`**: padding-top 1.5rem, padding-bottom 3rem.\n\n**`.panel`** and **`.panel-inner`**: exactly as in design system, with HUD grid overlay on panel-inner.\n\n**`.breadcrumb`**: small muted text, purple-hi links, purple separator.\n\n**Page title style** (`h1.page-title`): lime, uppercase, letter-spacing, left border bar 3px lime, padding-left 0.5rem, text-shadow glow.\n\n**`h2`**: lime, uppercase, letter-spacing 0.08em, text-shadow.\n\n**`.entity-grid`**: CSS grid, auto-fill minmax(280px,1fr), gap 1rem.\n\n**`.entity-card`**: panel style (gradient bg, lime border, box-shadow purple), border-radius 14px, padding 1rem, flex column, text-decoration none, color inherit, transition hover lift + stronger purple glow.\n\n**`.entity-card .card-title`**: lime, font-size 1.05rem, font-weight 700, text-transform uppercase, letter-spacing 0.05em, margin 0 0 0.4rem.\n\n**`.entity-card .card-meta`**: muted color, font-size 0.85rem.\n\n**`.badge`**, **`.badge-available`**, **`.badge-unavailable`**, **`.badge-purple`**: exactly as in design system.\n\n**`.data-table`**: full-width, border-collapse collapse, th styles (lime, uppercase, small, border-bottom lime), td styles (text, border-bottom subtle), tr:hover subtle lime bg.\n\n**`.btn`**, **`.btn-primary`**, **`.btn-accent`**, **`.btn-back`**: exactly as in design system. btn-back is like btn but with purple-hi border.\n\n**`.detail-grid`**: `display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr; gap: 1.5rem;` with `@media (max-width: 768px) { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }`.\n\n**`.detail-section`**: panel style applied, padding 1.25rem, margin-bottom 1rem.\n\n**`.detail-label`**: muted, font-size 0.78rem, text-transform uppercase, letter-spacing 0.1em, margin-bottom 0.2rem.\n\n**`.detail-value`**: text color, font-size 1rem, font-weight 600, font-family JetBrains Mono for IDs/numbers (add class `.mono`).\n\n**`.floor-grid`**: `display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(340px, 1fr)); gap: 1.25rem;`\n\n**`.floor-card`**: panel style, padding 1rem.\n\n**`.floor-card .casino-name`**: lime, font-size 1.2rem, uppercase, text-shadow glow, margin-bottom 0.6rem.\n\n**`.table-chips`**: flex wrap gap 0.5rem.\n\n**`.table-chip`**: pill shape (border-radius 999px), padding 0.3rem 0.7rem, font-size 0.8rem, font-weight 700. {"session_id":"a148685c-5db1-49cb-a112-a848bf1e1799","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/a148685c-5db1-49cb-a112-a848bf1e1799.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Agent","tool_input":{"description":"Write _Layout.cshtml and casino.css (ux-designer role)","prompt":"You are acting as the ux-designer sub-agent for a casino ASP.NET MVC app. Your job is to write view files and CSS only — no controllers, no models, no C# files.\n\nWrite these two files completely:\n\n---\n\n## FILE 1: `/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Views/Shared/_Layout.cshtml`\n\nReplace the existing file entirely. The app is called \"Casino Management System\". \n\nThe layout must use this exact structure and style:\n\n```html\n<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html lang=\"en\">\n<head>\n    <meta charset=\"utf-8\"/>\n    <meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0\"/>\n    <title>@ViewData[\"Title\"] - CMS</title>\n    <script type=\"importmap\"></script>\n    <!-- Google Fonts -->\n    <link rel=\"preconnect\" href=\"https://fonts.googleapis.com\">\n    <link rel=\"preconnect\" href=\"https://fonts.gstatic.com\" crossorigin>\n    <link href=\"https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Rajdhani:wght@700&family=Inter:wght@400;600&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@500&display=swap\" rel=\"stylesheet\">\n    <link rel=\"stylesheet\" href=\"~/lib/bootstrap/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css\"/>\n    <link rel=\"stylesheet\" href=\"~/css/casino.css\" asp-append-version=\"true\"/>\n</head>\n<body>\n<div class=\"app-shell\">\n  <nav class=\"top-bar\">\n    <a class=\"brand\" asp-controller=\"Home\" asp-action=\"Index\">CMS</a>\n    <ul class=\"nav-links\">\n      <li><a class=\"nav-link\" asp-controller=\"Casino\" asp-action=\"Index\">Casinos</a></li>\n      <li><a class=\"nav-link\" asp-controller=\"Player\" asp-action=\"Index\">Players</a></li>\n      <li><a class=\"nav-link\" asp-controller=\"Table\" asp-action=\"Index\">Tables</a></li>\n      <li><a class=\"nav-link\" asp-controller=\"Game\" asp-action=\"Index\">Games</a></li>\n      <li><a class=\"nav-link\" asp-controller=\"Employee\" asp-action=\"Index\">Employees</a></li>\n      <li><a class=\"nav-link\" asp-controller=\"Reservation\" asp-action=\"Index\">Reservations</a></li>\n    </ul>\n  </nav>\n  <main class=\"page-content\">\n    @RenderBody()\n  </main>\n  <footer class=\"site-footer\">\n    <span>Casino Management System &copy; 2026</span>\n  </footer>\n</div>\n<script src=\"~/lib/jquery/dist/jquery.min.js\"></script>\n<script src=\"~/lib/bootstrap/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js\"></script>\n<script src=\"~/js/site.js\" asp-append-version=\"true\"></script>\n@await RenderSectionAsync(\"Scripts\", required: false)\n</body>\n</html>\n```\n\n---\n\n## FILE 2: `/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/wwwroot/css/casino.css`\n\nWrite a complete CSS file with ALL of the following sections. Do not omit any section.\n\n### Color palette (CSS custom properties)\n```css\n:root {\n  --bg: #0e0c1a;\n  --panel: #1d1a2f;\n  --panel-deep: #15132a;\n  --green: #3f6d4e;\n  --lime: #8bd450;\n  --purple: #734f9a;\n  --purple-hi: #965fd4;\n  --text: #d6deff;\n  --muted: #9b96b0;\n  --danger: #ff5a7f;\n  --shadow: 0 14px 38px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);\n}\n```\n\n### Body\nDark radial-gradient background (NOT flat color), Inter font, text color, margin 0, min-height 100vh, overflow-x hidden:\n```css\nbody {\n  margin: 0;\n  min-height: 100vh;\n  font-family: 'Inter', 'Trebuchet MS', sans-serif;\n  color: var(--text);\n  background:\n    radial-gradient(circle at 18% 12%, #1a1430 0%, transparent 45%),\n    radial-gradient(circle at 78% 82%, #142511 0%, transparent 40%),\n    linear-gradient(160deg, #0b0a17 0%, #131025 45%, #0a0915 100%);\n  overflow-x: hidden;\n}\n```\n\n### Scan-line overlay (body::before)\n```css\nbody::before {\n  content: \"\";\n  position: fixed;\n  inset: 0;\n  pointer-events: none;\n  background:\n    linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.03) 1px, transparent 1px) 0 0 / 100% 3px,\n    repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0 36px, rgba(139,212,80,0.03) 36px 37px);\n  mix-blend-mode: screen;\n  opacity: 0.5;\n  animation: scan-drift 8s linear infinite;\n  z-index: 0;\n}\n```\n\n### .app-shell\n```css\n.app-shell {\n  width: min(1120px, 100%);\n  margin: 0 auto;\n  padding: 1rem;\n  position: relative;\n  z-index: 1;\n}\n```\n\n### .top-bar (navbar)\n```css\n.top-bar {\n  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1e1a30, #131025);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(139,212,80,0.22);\n  box-shadow: var(--shadow), inset 0 0 20px rgba(139,212,80,0.08);\n  border-radius: 14px;\n  padding: 0.85rem 1.2rem;\n  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;\n  display: flex;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  align-items: center;\n  flex-wrap: wrap;\n  gap: 0.75rem;\n}\n.brand {\n  font-family: 'Rajdhani', sans-serif;\n  font-size: 1.6rem;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  color: var(--lime);\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  letter-spacing: 0.12em;\n  text-decoration: none;\n  text-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(139,212,80,0.45), 0 0 26px rgba(139,212,80,0.2);\n}\n.nav-links {\n  list-style: none;\n  margin: 0;\n  padding: 0;\n  display: flex;\n  gap: 0.25rem;\n  flex-wrap: wrap;\n}\n.nav-links .nav-link {\n  color: var(--muted);\n  text-decoration: none;\n  font-size: 0.82rem;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  letter-spacing: 0.06em;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  padding: 0.35rem 0.65rem;\n  border-radius: 6px;\n  transition: color 120ms ease, background 120ms ease;\n}\n.nav-links .nav-link:hover {\n  color: var(--lime);\n  background: rgba(139,212,80,0.08);\n  text-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(139,212,80,0.35);\n}\n```\n\n### .page-content and .site-footer\n```css\n.page-content { padding-top: 0.5rem; padding-bottom: 3rem; }\n.site-footer {\n  text-align: center;\n  color: var(--muted);\n  font-size: 0.78rem;\n  padding: 1.5rem 0 0.5rem;\n  border-top: 1px solid rgba(139,212,80,0.1);\n  margin-top: 2rem;\n}\n```\n\n### .panel and .panel-inner\n```css\n.panel {\n  background: linear-gradient(145deg, #1a1230, #261540 35%, #1d1030 100%);\n  border-radius: 14px;\n  border: 1px solid rgba(139,212,80,0.22);\n  box-shadow: var(--shadow), 0 0 40px rgba(115,79,154,0.2);\n  padding: 1.25rem;\n}\n.panel-inner {\n  position: relative;\n  border-radius: 10px;\n  padding: 1rem;\n  overflow: hidden;\n  border: 1px solid rgba(139,212,80,0.14);\n  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(12,17,28,0.78), rgba(10,13,20,0.8));\n}\n.panel-inner::after {\n  content: \"\";\n  position: absolute;\n  inset: 0;\n  pointer-events: none;\n  background:\n    linear-gradient(rgba(139,212,80,0.06) 1px, transparent 1px) 0 0 / 100% 28px,\n    linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(139,212,80,0.06) 1px, transparent 1px) 0 0 / 28px 100%;\n  opacity: 0.22;\n}\n```\n\n### Headings\n```css\nh1.page-title {\n  font-family: 'Rajdhani', sans-serif;\n  color: var(--lime);\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  letter-spacing: 0.08em;\n  border-left: 3px solid var(--lime);\n  padding-left: 0.6rem;\n  margin: 0 0 1rem;\n  text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(139,212,80,0.35);\n}\nh2 {\n  font-family: 'Rajdhani', sans-serif;\n  color: var(--lime);\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  letter-spacing: 0.07em;\n  margin: 0 0 0.75rem;\n  text-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(139,212,80,0.25);\n}\nh3 { color: var(--text); letter-spacing: 0.04em; margin: 0 0 0.5rem; }\n```\n\n### Breadcrumb\n```css\n.breadcrumb-bar {\n  font-size: 0.8rem;\n  color: var(--muted);\n  margin-bottom: 1rem;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 0.3rem;\n}\n.breadcrumb-bar a { color: var(--purple-hi); text-decoration: none; }\n.breadcrumb-bar a:hover { color: var(--lime); }\n.breadcrumb-bar .sep { color: var(--purple); }\n.breadcrumb-bar .current { color: var(--text); }\n```\n\n### Entity grid + cards (index pages)\n```css\n.entity-grid {\n  display: grid;\n  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr));\n  gap: 1rem;\n  margin-top: 1rem;\n}\n.entity-card {\n  background: linear-gradient(145deg, #1a1230, #261540 35%, #1d1030 100%);\n  border-radius: 14px;\n  border: 1px solid rgba(139,212,80,0.22);\n  box-shadow: var(--shadow), 0 0 40px rgba(115,79,154,0.2);\n  padding: 1.1rem;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  gap: 0.4rem;\n  text-decoration: none;\n  color: inherit;\n  transition: transform 140ms ease, box-shadow 140ms ease, border-color 140ms ease;\n}\n.entity-card:hover {\n  transform: translateY(-3px);\n  border-color: rgba(139,212,80,0.5);\n  box-shadow: var(--shadow), 0 0 55px rgba(115,79,154,0.38);\n  color: inherit;\n}\n.entity-card .card-title {\n  font-family: 'Rajdhani', sans-serif;\n  color: var(--lime);\n  font-size: 1.05rem;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  letter-spacing: 0.05em;\n  margin: 0 0 0.3rem;\n}\n.entity-card .card-meta {\n  color: var(--muted);\n  font-size: 0.84rem;\n  line-height: 1.5;\n}\n.entity-card .card-footer-bar {\n  margin-top: auto;\n  padding-top: 0.6rem;\n  border-top: 1px solid rgba(139,212,80,0.1);\n  font-size: 0.78rem;\n  color: var(--purple-hi);\n  letter-spacing: 0.04em;\n}\n```\n\n### Badges\n```css\n.badge {\n  display: inline-block;\n  border-radius: 999px;\n  padding: 0.22rem 0.65rem;\n  font-size: 0.75rem;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  letter-spacing: 0.06em;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n}\n.badge-available {\n  background: rgba(63,109,78,0.3);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(139,212,80,0.55);\n  color: var(--lime);\n}\n.badge-unavailable {\n  background: rgba(30,20,50,0.5);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(155,150,176,0.28);\n  color: var(--muted);\n}\n.badge-purple {\n  background: rgba(115,79,154,0.28);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(150,95,212,0.55);\n  color: var(--purple-hi);\n}\n```\n\n### Data table\n```css\n.data-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; }\n.data-table thead tr {\n  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(139,212,80,0.28);\n}\n.data-table th {\n  text-align: left;\n  padding: 0.55rem 0.8rem;\n  color: var(--lime);\n  font-size: 0.74rem;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  letter-spacing: 0.12em;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n}\n.data-table td {\n  padding: 0.52rem 0.8rem;\n  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(139,212,80,0.07);\n  color: var(--text);\n  font-size: 0.9rem;\n}\n.data-table tbody tr:hover td { background: rgba(139,212,80,0.04); }\n.mono { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.88em; }\n```\n\n### Buttons\n```css\n.btn {\n  border: 1px solid rgba(139,212,80,0.35);\n  border-radius: 10px;\n  padding: 0.58rem 1rem;\n  background: linear-gradient(165deg, #1d2440, #12162a);\n  color: #e4f4cf;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  font-size: 0.84rem;\n  letter-spacing: 0.06em;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  text-decoration: none;\n  display: inline-block;\n  transition: transform 120ms ease, filter 120ms ease, box-shadow 120ms ease;\n}\n.btn:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); filter: brightness(1.12); color: #e4f4cf; }\n.btn:active { transform: scale(0.985); }\n.btn-primary {\n  border-color: rgba(139,212,80,0.8);\n  background: linear-gradient(165deg, #274830, #112113);\n  box-shadow: 0 0 16px rgba(139,212,80,0.24);\n  animation: throb-green 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;\n}\n.btn-accent {\n  border-color: rgba(150,95,212,0.75);\n  background: linear-gradient(165deg, #3a1f5a, #1e0f30);\n  box-shadow: 0 0 16px rgba(150,95,212,0.28);\n  animation: throb-purple 1.2s ease-in-out infinite;\n}\n.btn-back {\n  border-color: rgba(150,95,212,0.5);\n  color: var(--purple-hi);\n}\n.btn-back:hover { color: var(--lime); border-color: rgba(139,212,80,0.5); }\n```\n\n### Detail page layout\n```css\n.detail-grid {\n  display: grid;\n  grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr;\n  gap: 1.5rem;\n  margin-top: 1rem;\n}\n.detail-section {\n  background: linear-gradient(145deg, #1a1230, #261540 35%, #1d1030 100%);\n  border-radius: 14px;\n  border: 1px solid rgba(139,212,80,0.2);\n  box-shadow: var(--shadow), 0 0 40px rgba(115,79,154,0.18);\n  padding: 1.25rem;\n  margin-bottom: 1rem;\n}\n.detail-row { margin-bottom: 0.9rem; }\n.detail-label {\n  color: var(--muted);\n  font-size: 0.74rem;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  letter-spacing: 0.12em;\n  margin-bottom: 0.2rem;\n}\n.detail-value {\n  color: var(--text);\n  font-size: 1rem;\n  font-weight: 600;\n}\n```\n\n### Floor page (custom home)\n```css\n.floor-grid {\n  display: grid;\n  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(340px, 1fr));\n  gap: 1.25rem;\n  margin-top: 1rem;\n}\n.floor-card {\n  background: linear-gradient(145deg, #1a1230, #261540 35%, #1d1030 100%);\n  border-radius: 14px;\n  border: 1px solid rgba(139,212,80,0.22);\n  box-shadow: var(--shadow), 0 0 40px rgba(115,79,154,0.2);\n  padding: 1.1rem;\n}\n.floor-card .casino-name {\n  font-family: 'Rajdhani', sans-serif;\n  color: var(--lime);\n  font-size: 1.2rem;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  letter-spacing: 0.06em;\n  text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(139,212,80,0.35);\n  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;\n}\n.floor-card .casino-address {\n  color: var(--muted);\n  font-size: 0.82rem;\n  margin-bottom: 0.85rem;\n}\n.table-chips {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-wrap: wrap;\n  gap: 0.45rem;\n}\n.table-chip {\n  border-radius: 999px;\n  padding: 0.28rem 0.7rem;\n  font-size: 0.78rem;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  letter-spacing: 0.04em;\n  cursor: default;\n}\n.table-chip.available {\n  background: rgba(63,109,78,0.3);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(139,212,80,0.55);\n  color: var(--lime);\n}\n.table-chip.unavailable {\n  background: rgba(30,20,50,0.5);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(155,150,176,0.28);\n  color: var(--muted);\n}\n.floor-card .view-link {\n  display: inline-block;\n  margin-top: 0.85rem;\n  font-size: 0.78rem;\n  color: var(--purple-hi);\n  text-decoration: none;\n  letter-spacing: 0.04em;\n}\n.floor-card .view-link:hover { color: var(--lime); }\n```\n\n### Keyframe animations\n```css\n@keyframes scan-drift {\n  0%   { transform: translateY(0); }\n  100% { transform: translateY(3px); }\n}\n@keyframes throb-green {\n  0%,100% { box-shadow: 0 0 16px rgba(139,212,80,0.24); }\n  50%     { box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(139,212,80,0.58); }\n}\n@keyframes throb-purple {\n  0%,100% { box-shadow: 0 0 16px rgba(150,95,212,0.24); }\n  50%     { box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(150,95,212,0.6); }\n}\n@keyframes deal-in {\n  to { transform: translateY(0) scale(1); opacity: 1; }\n}\n@keyframes result-pop {\n  0%   { transform: scale(0.85); opacity: 0; }\n  60%  { transform: scale(1.08); opacity: 1; }\n  100% { transform: scale(1);    opacity: 1; }\n}\n```\n\n### Responsive\n```css\n@media (max-width: 768px) {\n  .detail-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }\n  .top-bar { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; }\n}\n@media (max-width: 600px) {\n  .entity-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }\n  .floor-grid  { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }\n}\n```\n\nWrite both files completely. color: var(--purple-hi);\n  letter-spacing: 0.04em;\n}\n\n/* ── Badges ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */\n.badge {\n  display: inline-block;\n  border-radius: 999px;\n  padding: 0.22rem 0.65rem;\n  font-size: 0.75rem;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  letter-spacing: 0.06em;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n}\n\n.badge-available {\n  background: rgba(63,109,78,0.3);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(139,212,80,0.55);\n  color: var(--lime);\n}\n\n.badge-unavailable {\n  background: rgba(30,20,50,0.5);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(155,150,176,0.28);\n  color: var(--muted);\n}\n\n.badge-purple {\n  background: rgba(115,79,154,0.28);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(150,95,212,0.55);\n  color: var(--purple-hi);\n}\n\n/* ── Data table ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */\n.data-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; }\n\n.data-table thead tr {\n  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(139,212,80,0.28);\n}\n\n.data-table th {\n  text-align: left;\n  padding: 0.55rem 0.8rem;\n  color: var(--lime);\n  font-size: 0.74rem;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  letter-spacing: 0.12em;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n}\n\n.data-table td {\n  padding: 0.52rem 0.8rem;\n  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(139,212,80,0.07);\n  color: var(--text);\n  font-size: 0.9rem;\n}\n\n.data-table tbody tr:hover td { background: rgba(139,212,80,0.04); }\n\n.mono { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.88em; }\n\n/* ── Buttons ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */\n.btn {\n  border: 1px solid rgba(139,212,80,0.35);\n  border-radius: 10px;\n  padding: 0.58rem 1rem;\n text-decoration: none;\n  display: inline-block;\n  transition: transform 120ms ease, filter 120ms ease, box-shadow 120ms ease;\n}\n\n.btn:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); filter: brightness(1.12); color: #e4f4cf; }\n.btn:active { transform: scale(0.985); }\n\n.btn-primary {\n  border-color: rgba(139,212,80,0.8);\n  background: linear-gradient(165deg, #274830, #112113);\n  box-shadow: 0 0 16px rgba(139,212,80,0.24);\n  animation: throb-green 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;\n}\n\n.btn-accent {\n  border-color: rgba(150,95,212,0.75);\n  background: linear-gradient(165deg, #3a1f5a, #1e0f30);\n  box-shadow: 0 0 16px rgba(150,95,212,0.28);\n  animation: throb-purple 1.2s ease-in-out infinite;\n}\n\n.btn-back {\n  border-color: rgba(150,95,212,0.5);\n  color: var(--purple-hi);\n}\n\n.btn-back:hover { color: var(--lime); border-color: rgba(139,212,80,0.5); }\n\n/* ── Detail page layout ─────────────────────────────────────── */\n.detail-grid {\n  display: minmax(340px, 1fr));\n  gap: 1.25rem;\n  margin-top: 1rem;\n}\n\n.floor-card {\n  background: linear-gradient(145deg, #1a1230, #261540 35%, #1d1030 100%);\n  border-radius: 14px;\n  border: 1px solid Tag helpers: asp-controller, asp-action, asp-route-id.\n\n---\n\n## FILE 1: `/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Views/Table/Index.cshtml`\n\n```\n@model List<aspnet.Models.Table>\n```\n\n- ViewData[\"Title\"] = \"Tables\"\n- Breadcrumb: Home › Tables\n- h1.page-title: \"Tables\"\n- `.entity-grid` of `.entity-card` — each links to Table/Details/{id}\n  - `.card-title`: \"Table #\" + table.TableNumber + \" — \" + table.Game.Name\n  - `.card-meta`: Casino name (table.Casino.Name), Bet range: table.MinBet–table.MaxBet (mono)\n  - `.card-footer-bar`: IsAvailable badge (`.badge-available` \"Available\" or `.badge-unavailable` \"In Use\")\n\n---\n\n## FILE 2: `/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Views/Table/Details.cshtml`\n\n```\n@model aspnet.Models.Table\n```\n\n- ViewData[\"Title\"] = \"Table #\" + Model.TableNumber\n- Breadcrumb: Home › Tables › Table #{Model.TableNumber}\n- h1.page-title: \"Table #\" + Model.TableNumber\n- `.detail-grid`:\n  - LEFT: Table number (mono), Casino (link to Casino/Details), Game (link to Game/Details), Min bet (mono), Max bet (mono), Status badge\n  - RIGHT: Reservations sub-list — for each reservation: Player name, ReservedAt\n- Back button\n\n---\n\n## FILE 3: `/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Views/Game/Index.cshtml`\n\n```\n@model List<aspnet.Models.Game>\n```\n\n- ViewData[\"Title\"] = \"Games\"\n- Breadcrumb: Home › Games\n- h1.page-title: \"Games\"\n- `.entity-grid` of `.entity-card` — each links to Game/Details/{id}\n  - `.card-title`: game.Name\n  - `.card-meta`: Type (`.badge-purple`), Description, Bet range (mono)\n  - `.card-footer-bar`: \"{game.Tables.Count} tables\"\n\n---\n\n## FILE 4: `/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Views/Game/Details.cshtml`\n\n```\n@model aspnet.Models.Game\n```\n\n- ViewData[\"Title\"] = Model.Name\n- Breadcrumb: Home › Games › {Model.Name}\n- h1.page-title: Model.Name\n- `.detail-grid`:\n  - LEFT: Name, Type (badge), Description, Min bet (mono), Max bet (mono)\n  - RIGHT: Tables using this game — for each: TableNumber, Casino.Name, IsAvailable badge\n- Back button\n\nWrite all four files completely. Create `Views/Table/` and `Views/Game/` directories as needed.","run_in_background":true},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01HiMDRmTPXxpAavrb367JG8"}

{"session_id":"a148685c-5db1-49cb-a112-a848bf1e1799","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/a148685c-5db1-49cb-a112-a848bf1e1799.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Agent","tool_input":{"description":"Write Employee + Reservation + Home Floor views (ux-designer role)","prompt":"You are the ux-designer sub-agent for a casino ASP.NET MVC app. Write Razor view files only — no .cs files ever.\n\nUse design system CSS classes: `.panel`, `.entity-grid`, `.entity-card` (with `.card-title`, `.card-meta`, `.card-footer-bar`), `.data-table`, `.breadcrumb-bar`, `.btn .btn-back`, `.badge-available`, `.badge-unavailable`, `.badge-purple`, `.detail-grid`, `.detail-section`, `.detail-row`, `.detail-label`, `.detail-value`, `.mono`, `.floor-grid`, `.floor-card`, `.casino-name`, `.casino-address`, `.table-chips`, `.table-chip.available`, `.table-chip.unavailable`, `.view-link`. Tag helpers: asp-controller, asp-action, asp-route-id.\n\n---\n\n## FILE 1: `/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Views/Employee/Index.cshtml`\n\n```\n@model List<aspnet.Models.Employee>\n```\n\n- ViewData[\"Title\"] = \"Employees\"\n- Breadcrumb: Home › Employees\n- h1.page-title: \"Employees\"\n- `.data-table` (tabular makes sense here):\n  - Columns: #ID (mono), Name, Position, Casino, Actions\n  - Each row: employee.Id, FirstName + LastName, Position, Casino.Name (link to Casino/Details), \"Details\" button to Employee/Details/{id}\n\n---\n\n## FILE 2: `/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Views/Employee/Details.cshtml`\n\n```\n@model aspnet.Models.Employee\n```\n\n- ViewData[\"Title\"] = Model.FirstName + \" \" + Model.LastName\n- Breadcrumb: Home › Employees › {name}\n- h1.page-title: full name\n- Single `.detail-section` (no side column needed):\n  - ID (mono), First name, Last name, Position (badge-purple), Casino (link to Casino/Details/{Casino.Id})\n- Back button\n\n---\n\n## FILE 3: `/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Views/Reservation/Index.cshtml`\n\n```\n@model List<aspnet.Models.Reservation>\n```\n\n- ViewData[\"Title\"] = \"Reservations\"\n- Breadcrumb: Home › Reservations\n- h1.page-title: \"Reservations\"\n- `.data-table`:\n  - Columns: #ID (mono), Player, Casino, Game, Table #, Reserved At, Actions\n  - Each row: Id, Player.FirstName+LastName (link to Player/Details), Table.Casino.Name, Table.Game.Name, Table.TableNumber (mono), ReservedAt.ToString(\"dd MMM yyyy HH:mm\"), Details button\n\n---\n\n## FILE 4: `/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Views/Reservation/Details.cshtml`\n\n```\n@model aspnet.Models.Reservation\n```\n\n- ViewData[\"Title\"] = \"Reservation #\" + Model.Id\n- Breadcrumb: Home › Reservations › Reservation #{Model.Id}\n- h1.page-title: \"Reservation #\" + Model.Id\n- `.detail-grid`:\n  - LEFT: Reservation ID (mono), Reserved At (mono), Player name (link to Player/Details), Player email, Player balance\n  - RIGHT: Table number (mono), Game name (link to Game/Details), Casino name (link to Casino/Details), Casino address, IsAvailable badge\n- Back button\n\n---\n\n## FILE 5: `/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Views/Home/Index.cshtml`\n\n```\n@model List<aspnet.Models.Casino>\n```\n\nThis is the custom \"Casino Floor\" page — the thematic home page.\n\n- ViewData[\"Title\"] = \"Casino Floor\"\n- NO breadcrumb (this is the home page)\n- A short header section: h1.page-title \"Casino Floor\", subtitle paragraph (muted text): \"Live overview of all venues and table availability\"\n- Stats bar: three stat chips (inline-flex row) showing total casinos count, total tables count, available tables count — styled with `.badge-purple` for labels and lime mono numbers\n- `.floor-grid` of `.floor-card` — one per casino:\n  - `.casino-name`: casino.Name (also a link to Casino/Details/{id})\n  - `.casino-address`: casino.Address\n  - `.table-chips`: for each table in casino.Tables — a `.table-chip` with class \"available\" or \"unavailable\", showing \"T{table.TableNumber} · {table.Game.Name}\"\n  - `.view-link` at bottom: \"View details →\" linking to Casino/Details/{id}\n\nWrite all five files completely. Create `Views/Employee/`, `Views/Reservation/` directories as needed. The Home/Index.cshtml already exists — overwrite it.","run_in_background":true},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01KzesboypeQVZjFhD1hAfze"}

{"session_id":"a148685c-5db1-49cb-a112-a848bf1e1799","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/a148685c-5db1-49cb-a112-a848bf1e1799.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","agent_id":"ac1d28751ee16551b","agent_type":"general-purpose","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Views/Home/Index.cshtml","content":"@model List<aspnet.Models.Casino>\n@{\n    ViewData[\"Title\"] = \"Casino Floor\";\n\n    var totalCasinos = Model.Count;\n    var totalTables = Model.Sum(c => c.Tables.Count);\n    var availableTables = Model.Sum(c => c.Tables.Count(t => t.IsAvailable));\n}\n\n<div class=\"page-header\">\n    <h1 class=\"page-title\">Casino Floor</h1>\n    <p class=\"text-muted\">Live overview of all venues and table availability</p>\n</div>\n\n<div style=\"display: inline-flex; @table.Game.Name\n                    </span>\n                }\n            </div>\n            <a class=\"view-link\" asp-controller=\"Casino\" asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-id=\"@casino.Id\">View details &rarr;</a>\n        </div>\n    }\n</div>\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01CgTczMupagyFtre7TmqQry"}

Back button to Employee/Index.\n\n3. `/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Views/Reservation/Index.cshtml` — `.data-table` with columns #ID (mono), Player (linked to Player/Details), Casino, Game, Table # (mono), Reserved At (mono, `\"dd MMM yyyy HH:mm\"`), and a Details button.\n\n4. `/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Views/Reservation/Details.cshtml` — `.detail-grid` with left section (Reservation ID/mono, Reserved At/mono, Player name/linked, Player email, Player balance/mono) and right section (Table number/mono, Game/linked to Game/Details, Casino/linked to Casino/Details, Casino address, IsAvailable badge). Back button to Reservation/Index.\n\n5. `/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Views/Home/Index.cshtml` — Overwritten as the \"Casino Floor\" thematic home page. No breadcrumb. Header with `.page-title` and muted subtitle. Inline stats bar using `.badge-purple` labels and lime `.mono` numbers (total casinos, total tables, available tables). `.floor-grid` of `.floor-cards` each with `.casino-name` (linked), `.casino-address`, `.table-chips` (`.table-chip.available` / `.table-chip.unavailable` per table showing `T{n} · {game}`), and a `.view-link` at the bottom.\n\nThe `Views/Employee/` and `Views/Reservation/` directories were created from scratch. All patterns (tag helpers, CSS classes, mono/badge usage) are consistent with the existing Casino and Player views.</result>\n<usage><total_tokens>19046</total_tokens><tool_uses>15</tool_uses><duration_ms>75372</duration_ms></usage>\n</task-notification>"}
